issues.description: Condition should specify 'rested' state. HasCardOnBoard does not check resting status. Should be a compound condition or custom resting check.

Trigger 'OnPlay' only applies when this card enters play. The effect should be a passive/static ability that checks the condition continuously, not just on play. Consider 'Trigger' or a continuous passive state.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have a rested [Uta], this Character gains +1000 power.
